news.headline: Immuron releases letter to shareholders with updates on projects.

news.summary: Mullen Group Ltd. (TSX: MTL) based in Okotoks, Alberta, disclosed today the successful finalization of the purchase of Cole Group Inc., Cole International Inc., Abco International Freight Inc., and associated entities on June 1, 2025. The acquisition includes various businesses under the umbrella of the Cole Group.
news.headline: Mullen Group Ltd. completes acquisition of Cole Group of Companies, effective June 1, 2025. TSX: MTL.

news.summary: Wilmington, DE - Aimfinity Investment Corp. I (AIMA) (Nasdaq: AIMTF), a special purpose acquisition company registered in the Cayman Islands, has officially extended its deadline to complete its initial business combination from May 28, 2025, to June 28, 2025. The extension was made possible by I-Fa Chang, the manager of the sponsor of the Company, who deposited a total of $55,823.8 into the Trust Account on May 28, 2025. This payment equates to $0.05 per Class A ordinary share held by public shareholders and is referred to as the "Monthly Extension Payment."
news.headline: Aimfinity Investment Corp. I moving from Nasdaq to OTC markets, extends business combo deadline to June 28, 2025 with $55,823.8.

news.summary: On May 30, 2025, in Vancouver, British Columbia, Zymeworks Inc. (Nasdaq: ZYME) announced that the National Medical Products Administration (NMPA) in China has given approval for zanidatamab to be used in treating patients with previously treated, unresectable or metastatic HER2-positive (HER2+) biliary tract cancer (BTC). This marks the approval of the first dual HER2-targeted bispecific antibody for HER2-high expression (IHC3+) BTC in China. The approval was obtained by Zymeworks' collaboration partner, BeOne Medicines Ltd., through their Asia Pacific license and collaboration agreement. Future approval for this indication will depend on the results from ongoing confirmatory trials.
news.headline: Zymeworks' zanidatamab approved by NMPA in China for HER2-high expression BTC. First dual HER2-targeted bispecific antibody.

news.summary: In Bellevue, Washington, MangoBoost and AIC Inc. have signed a Memorandum of Understanding to potentially collaborate on advanced computing technologies. MangoBoost specializes in system solutions to maximize efficiency and scalability, while AIC Inc. is a global leader in enterprise server and storage solutions. The MoU establishes a framework for discussions on integrating MangoBoost's Data Processing unit. This partnership aims to leverage the expertise of both companies in developing and promoting innovative technologies for improved computing capabilities.
news.headline: MangoBoost & AIC sign MoU for collaboration on DPU-based server and storage solutions in Bellevue, explores advanced tech.

news.summary: A new initiative, the Lippincott Nursing Advisory Board, has been launched by Wolters Kluwer in New Delhi. The aim is to promote nursing excellence, standardize care, and improve patient outcomes through evidence-based knowledge and clinical decision support. This Board was introduced at ANEICON, the leading nursing conference in India. It emphasizes continuous professional development and aligns with Wolters Kluwer's 'Make it Better' mission. The launch event saw a gathering of nursing professionals and experts sharing insights on enhancing healthcare practices, with a focus on improving quality of care. Wolters Kluwer is dedicated to driving positive change in the nursing sector with this innovative initiative.
news.headline: Wolters Kluwer launches Lippincott Nursing Advisory Board in India to elevate clinical excellence - announced at ANEICON.

news.summary: On May 30, 2025 in New York, Levi & Korsinsky, LLP issued a notice to investors holding shares in Treace Medical Concepts, Inc. (NASDAQ: TMCI) regarding a class action securities lawsuit. The lawsuit pertains to losses incurred by investors and aims to represent a defined class of individuals affected by the alleged misconduct. The specific details of the losses and the lawsuit are being pursued on behalf of these investors as part of the legal action initiated against Treace Medical Concepts, Inc.
news.headline: Investors of Treace Medical Concepts, Inc. (NASDAQ: TMCI) should contact Levi & Korsinsky before June 10, 2025 regarding a class action securities lawsuit.

news.summary: On May 30, 2025, Levi & Korsinsky, LLP issued a notification to investors holding shares in DoubleVerify Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: DV) regarding a class action securities lawsuit. The lawsuit aims to recoup losses for investors in DoubleVerify Holdings, Inc. The legal action is being taken on behalf of individuals who fall under the class definition.
news.headline: Shareholders of DoubleVerify Holdings, Inc. (DV) urged to contact Levi & Korsinsky before July 21, 2025 regarding class action lawsuit - NY, May 30, 2025.

news.summary: Actress Dakota Johnson has been announced as the new Global Brand Ambassador for Roberto Coin, a renowned jewelry brand. The award-winning actress will be starring in a new campaign for the brand, showcasing their latest collections to a global audience. Johnson's influence and star power are expected to bring exposure to the brand across various platforms, reaching millions of potential customers worldwide.
news.headline: Dakota Johnson becomes global brand ambassador for Roberto Coin in new jewelry campaign.

news.summary: Recent research has confirmed an uptick in profit-taking within the Bitcoin market. This trend is evidenced by the liquidation of Hyperliquid's Wynn during the most recent 10% decline in BTC's price. This development highlights the volatility within the cryptocurrency market, with significant numbers of traders opting to take profits amidst price fluctuations.
news.headline: James Wynn loses $100M as Bitcoin profit-taking rises, with recent 10% price retreat liquidating Hyperliquid's Wynn.

news.summary: In an important development highlighting increased academic collaboration between India and the United States, the City University of New York (CUNY) has introduced a specialized research platform known as the Achyuta Samanta India Initiative of the CUNY CREST Institute (ASIICCI). This initiative, named after Dr. Achyuta Samanta, a respected Indian educator and altruist, is concentrated on academic research within the social and educational sectors of India. This collaboration aims to enhance research efforts in these areas and strengthen ties between academic institutions in the two countries.
news.headline: Dr. Achyuta Samanta gets research institute at CUNY, USA for Indian academia; Named ASIICCI.

news.summary: On May 30, 2025, in Stockholm, the Board of Truecaller made a decision to use the authority granted by the Annual General Meeting held on May 23, 2025, to repurchase B-shares. The buyback scheme aims to provide the board of directors with flexibility in adjusting the company's portfolio. Reaffirming its commitment to enhancing shareholder value, Truecaller will repurchase a significant number of B-shares pursuant to the resolution adopted at the Annual General Meeting.
news.headline: Truecaller's board to resume B-share buybacks after AGM approval on May 23, 2025, for continuous adaptation.

news.summary: In March, the United States saw a notable increase in individuals holding multiple full- or part-time jobs, surpassing 8.9 million for the first time since 1994.
news.headline: Over 8.9 million Americans now engage in 'polyworking', holding multiple jobs simultaneously - a 25-year high.

news.summary: The Trump administration has increased Palantir's involvement with the government, extending the company's technology across various agencies. This move could potentially combine data on American citizens.
news.headline: Trump expands Palantir's role in gov't, allowing integration of American data across agencies.

news.summary: In the latest report, it has been revealed that the unemployment rate has dropped to a record low of 3.8%, with the economy adding 250,000 new jobs last month. This decrease marks the lowest level of unemployment in over a decade. Additionally, the stock market saw a significant increase, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average rising by 500 points. Experts attribute this positive trend to various factors, including strong consumer spending and growth in key industries such as technology and healthcare. Overall, these indicators point to a robust and thriving economy, providing optimism for the future.
news.headline: Judge faces challenge in Google search case due to data issue, with numbers playing a crucial role.

news.summary: According to recent reports, the productivity of workers in the manufacturing sector has increased by an impressive 15% in the past year. This growth has been attributed to the implementation of new technologies and training programs. Additionally, the sector has seen a significant decrease in workplace accidents, with a reduction of 25% compared to the previous year. This positive trend has also led to a rise in profits, with a reported 12% increase in revenue for manufacturing companies. Experts predict that this trend is likely to continue in the coming months, indicating a strong and thriving manufacturing industry.
news.headline: Tips for snagging a bargain this summer: Take advantage of a lower dollar and decreasing airfares.

news.summary: The newspaper has recently made its first licensing deal focused on AI technology. This agreement involves allowing its content to be utilized on Alexa and Amazon's AI training models.
news.headline: AI licensing deal: New York Times partners with Amazon, using content for Alexa and AI training.

news.summary: In the Middle East from January to April 2025, JETOUR, a Chinese auto brand, has achieved the top spot among its counterparts, selling more than 20,000 units. The markets contributing to this success include Saudi Arabia, the UAE, Iraq, Qatar, and Kuwait. This significant milestone is a testament to the brand's growing presence and popularity in the region.
news.headline: JETOUR tops sales for Chinese brands in Middle East Jan-Apr 2025; 20,000 units sold in key markets.
